title: Item Behavior Document
description: A behavior pack item definition document for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. This describes the complete JSON file structure including format_version and the minecraft:item wrapper. Items define the properties, components, and behaviors of custom items that can be obtained and used by players.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this item behavior file. Determines which features and component schemas are available. Use '1.20.20' or later for the latest item component system.

minecraft:item.title: Item Definition
minecraft:item.description: The item definition container with description and components sections.

description.title: Description
description.description: Contains the item's unique identifier and optional menu category placement.

defaultSnippets.label: Item Description
defaultSnippets.description: Contains the required identifier for the item. May contain optional fields like menu_category.

components.title: Components
components.description: The components that define this item's behavior, appearance, and interactions.

defaultSnippets.label: Item Definition
defaultSnippets.description: The item definition container with description and components sections.
